cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-consumer-require.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c tests/c_backend_tbp_parent_registration_mod_01.f90 -o "$tmpdir/mod.o" > "$tmpdir/mod.out" 2> "$tmpdir/mod.err" && lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -I"$tmpdir" -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o" > "$tmpdir/main.out" 2> "$tmpdir/main.err" && grep -R -F -q "__lfortran_force_link_type_parent_" "$tmpdir/main.o.tmp.split"/*.c #
